languages.text: "Если за всем стоит она, нам нужно застать ее с поличным при передаче сведений врагу — никак не меньше".

traits.locale_text: "Если за всем стоит она, нам нужно застать ее с поличным при передаче сведений врагу — никак не меньше".

languages.text: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."
languages.original_text: "Если за всем стоит она, нам нужно застать ее с поличным при передаче сведений врагу — никак не меньше".

traits.locale_text: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."
"If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."
"If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."

languages.text: “如果真是她在背后捣鬼，我们就必须当场抓到她向敌人传递情报，此事别无他法。”
languages.original_text: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."

traits.locale_text: “如果真是她在背后捣鬼，我们就必须当场抓到她向敌人传递情报，此事别无他法。”

languages.text: « Si c'est elle qui est derrière tout ça, nous devons la prendre la main dans le sac, en train de transmettre des informations à l'ennemi, rien de moins. »
languages.original_text: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."

traits.locale_text: « Si c'est elle qui est derrière tout ça, nous devons la prendre la main dans le sac, en train de transmettre des informations à l'ennemi, rien de moins. »

languages.text: "Tüm bunların ardında o varsa onu düşmana bilgi sızdırırken suçüstü yakalamamız gerekiyor. Başka türlü kanıtlamamız imkânsız."
languages.original_text: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."

traits.locale_text: "Tüm bunların ardında o varsa onu düşmana bilgi sızdırırken suçüstü yakalamamız gerekiyor. Başka türlü kanıtlamamız imkânsız."

languages.text: «Si ella es la responsable de esto, debemos descubrirla en el acto de transmitir información al enemigo: esa es nuestra única opción».
languages.original_text: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."

traits.locale_text: «Si ella es la responsable de esto, debemos descubrirla en el acto de transmitir información al enemigo: esa es nuestra única opción».

languages.text: "Wenn sie hinter all dem steckt, müssen wir sie erwischen, wenn sie Informationen an den Feind weitergibt ... das ist die einzige Chance."
languages.original_text: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn sie hinter all dem steckt, müssen wir sie erwischen, wenn sie Informationen an den Feind weitergibt ... das ist die einzige Chance."

languages.text: 「彼女がすべてを操っているなら、敵に情報を渡す現場を捕まえるしかない。それ以外では済まない」
languages.original_text: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."

traits.locale_text: 「彼女がすべてを操っているなら、敵に情報を渡す現場を捕まえるしかない。それ以外では済まない」
